summary: PART I . Overview We were originally incorporated under the name Plum Acquisition Corp. I. as a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses.
